ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from Spotify for the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the track */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams for the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score indicating the musical positiveness */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spotify_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Spotify ID of the associated track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "spotify_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tracks" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the track */,
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Spotify ID of the track interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_spotify_id FOREIGN KEY ("spotify_id") REFERENCES tracks ("spotify_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic entry */,
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Spotify ID of the tracked track */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the statistics */,
  "daily_streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams recorded for that day */,
  "monthly_streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams recorded for that month */,
  "total_streams" INTEGER /* Total streams recorded for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_stats_spotify_id FOREIGN KEY ("spotify_id") REFERENCES tracks ("spotify_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_stats" (
  "artist_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist statistic entry */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the statistics */,
  "total_streams" INTEGER /* Total streams recorded for the artist */,
  "monthly_streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams recorded for the artist that month */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_stats_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Spotify ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spotify_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_genre" TEXT /* Preferred music genre of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the recommendation is made */,
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Spotify ID of the recommended track */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on listening history) */,
  "score" REAL /* Confidence score for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_spotify_id FOREIGN KEY ("spotify_id") REFERENCES tracks ("spotify_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used by the user */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date the device was last used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "device_id")
)
